Bash(node -e 'const{PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{const r=await p.appSettings.findUnique\({where:{id:'\\''default'\\''}}\);if\(r\){const d=r.data;d.outreach.maxReferralTargetsPerJob=10;await p.appSettings.update\({where:{id:'\\''default'\\''},data:{data:d}}\);console.log\('\\''DB cap → 10'\\''\);}else console.log\('\\''no DB row \(config default 10 applies\)'\\''\);await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\);')
